creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
The build host (the Poudriere server providing the build jail) is:

# uname -a
FreeBSD poudriere 13.0-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p1 #0: Wed May 26 22:15:09 UTC 2021     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

# freebsd-version -ku
13.0-RELEASE-p1
13.0-RELEASE-p2

# pkg info -x poudriere
poudriere-devel-3.3.99.20210521
